name: futuresearch-mcp
description: Give your AI a research team. Forecast, score, classify, or research every row of a dataset.
long_description: MCP server for futuresearch: give your AI a research team. Each operation dispatches web research agents across a dataset to forecast, score, classify, deduplicate, merge, or research at scale.

tools.name: futuresearch_rank
tools.description: Score and sort rows in a CSV file based on any criteria.

tools.name: futuresearch_dedupe
tools.description: Remove duplicate rows from a CSV file using semantic equivalence.

tools.name: futuresearch_merge
tools.description: Join two CSV files using intelligent entity matching.

tools.name: futuresearch_agent
tools.description: Run web research agents on each row of a CSV file.

tools.name: futuresearch_forecast
tools.description: Forecast questions about the future using deep research and multi-model ensemble.

tools.name: futuresearch_classify
tools.description: Classify each row of a dataset into one of the provided categories.

tools.name: futuresearch_single_agent
tools.description: Run a single web research agent on a task, optionally with context data.

tools.name: futuresearch_progress
tools.description: Check progress of a running task. Blocks briefly to limit the polling rate.

tools.name: futuresearch_status
tools.description: Check task status and display a live progress widget.

tools.name: futuresearch_results
tools.description: Retrieve results from a completed futuresearch task and save them to a CSV.

tools.name: futuresearch_list_sessions
tools.description: List futuresearch sessions owned by the authenticated user (paginated).

tools.name: futuresearch_list_session_tasks
tools.description: List all tasks in a session with their IDs, statuses, and types.

tools.name: futuresearch_cancel
tools.description: Cancel a running futuresearch task. Use when the user wants to stop a task that is currently processing.

tools.name: futuresearch_upload_data
tools.description: Upload data from a URL or local file. Returns an artifact_id for use in processing tools.

tools.name: futuresearch_balance
tools.description: Check the current billing balance for the authenticated user.

tools.name: futuresearch_task_cost
tools.description: Get the billed cost of a completed task.

tools.name: futuresearch_browse_lists
tools.description: Browse available reference lists of well-known entities.

tools.name: futuresearch_use_list
tools.description: Import a reference list into your session and make it available via artifact_id for other futuresearch tools.

api_key.title: FutureSearch API Key
api_key.description: Your API key from https://cohort.futuresearch.ai/app ($20 free credit)
